## Testing
<!-- How did you verify this works? New tests? Manual reproduction? -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`npm test`)
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run` still shows only the files listed in `package.json#files`
- [ ] No secrets or tokens in the diff
- [ ] README / docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Target branch is `staging` (not `main`)
